title: Mortgage Rates Hit Highest Since August as War Fans Inflation
title_cn: 战争助长通货膨胀，抵押贷款利率创八月以来新高
summary: Diane Swonk, Chief Economist at KPMG joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Markets." US mortgage rates surged this week to the highest level since August, threatening a spring selling season that was just starting to get a pulse. The average rate for 30-year fixed loans jumped to 6.51% from 6.36%, the biggest weekly increase since the end of March, Freddie Mac reported on Thursday.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Stocks Rise and Oil Falls on US-Iran Deal Hopes: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 美国与伊朗达成协议，股市上涨，油价下跌：市场结束
summary: Hopes for a diplomatic way out of the war in Iran lifted stocks and bonds as oil dropped on speculation that a deal would pave the way for a revival of energy flows through the key Strait of Hormuz.

title: Walmart Stock is Rich: Champine
title_cn: 沃尔玛股票很丰富：Champine

A standoff between the US and Iran over key issues lifted oil prices, dragging down stocks and bonds on concern that a prolonged closure of the Strait of Hormuz could worsen energy disruptions and fuel inflation. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gold Declines as Traders Weigh Rate Path After US-Iran Standoff
title_cn: 交易商在美伊僵局后权衡利率走势，金价下跌

title: SpaceX IPO Requires a Leap of Faith in AI, Musk and Mars

summary: Elon Musk’s SpaceX pulled back the curtain on a business empire that has racked up ballooning losses and debt after acquiring a cash-hungry startup, and pumping billions of dollars into futuristic endeavors ranging from AI to a Mars rocket.

title: Oil Gains as Iran’s Uranium Stance Clouds Hormuz Outlook
title_cn: 伊朗的铀立场给霍尔木兹海峡前景蒙上阴影，油价上涨
summary:
Oil gained Monday as traders weighed conflicting reports on Iran’s uranium enrichment, a key sticking point in peace negotiations with the US that could dictate the pace of reopening the vital Strait of Hormuz.

West Texas Intermediate traded above $101 a barrel Monday after sliding 5.7% in the previous session. Prices pared some gains after Al Jazeera reported no new uranium directive had been issued, citing an unnamed Iranian official. Traders have been on high alert for clues on the status of negotiations between the US and Iran to parse when the strait — subject to a double blockade by Tehran and the US military — might reopen and to gird against a potential return to active fighting. The virtual closure of the waterway, a key global energy shipping route, has caused energy prices to soar.

We get reaction from Mike McGlone, Senior Commodity Strategist for Bloomberg Intelligence. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Open Interest 5/21/2026
title_cn: 未平仓合约 2026 年 5 月 21 日
summary: Get a jump start on the US trading day with Matt Miller and Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Open Interest." Nvidia’s blowout earnings fail to supercharge the AI trade, as investors eye the next wave of mega IPOs from SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic. Plus, Jamie Dimon’s AI hiring shift: more AI staff, fewer bankers Plus,  warnings on the AI debt boom, e.l.f Beauty’s Rhode-fueled surge, and a Trump advisor’s prediction for lower gas prices. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Brazilian Executives Waver on Flávio Bolsonaro Over His Ties to Jailed CEO
title_cn: 巴西高管对弗拉维奥·博尔索纳罗与被监禁首席执行官的关系犹豫不决
summary: Some Brazilian executives and investors are tempering their support for presidential candidate Flávio Bolsonaro as he seeks backing in the nation’s financial hub days after details emerged about his relationship with a scandal-plagued banker.

title: Stellantis Plots $70 Billion Turnaround on Brand Reset
title_cn: Stellantis 计划通过品牌重置实现 700 亿美元的扭亏为盈
summary:
Stellantis NV announced a major investment push focused on four core brands in a broad reset to boost profitability. The automaking group will spend some €60 billion ($70 billion) through 2030 to launch 60 new models, prioritizing the Jeep, Ram, Peugeot and Fiat brands. 

In North America, it plans to add a new compact and midsize pickup truck as well as a new entry-level model for the Dodge brand to help it rebuild after years of sales declines. Chrysler, which today sells just a minivan, will get three new crossover models with a price range of $25,000 to $35,000. Stellantis is also targeting 25% revenue growth in North America.

For more, we speak with Craig Trudell, Managing Editor of Global Business Coverage for Bloomberg News. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Home Buyers Hit as Bond Rout Drives Rates Higher
title_cn: 债券溃败导致利率走高，购房者受到打击
summary:
Since the oil-price shock from President Donald Trump’s Iran war unleashed the biggest jump in inflation since 2023, bond prices have tumbled, pushing yields on some US government debt to the highest levels in nearly two decades. 
The rate on 10-year Treasuries, which sets the floor for mortgages, has climbed to around 4.6%, with traders saying 5% is within reach.
Gennadiy Goldberg, Head of US Rates Strategy at TD Securities, joins to discuss rates breaking through key technical levels, what's really driving the selloff, and how the Fed should react. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: French Resilience to Iran War Wilts in Blow to Budget Plans
title_cn: 法国对伊朗战争的抵抗力因预算计划的打击而减弱
summary: France’s economic sturdiness in the face of the Iran war shock is crumbling, jeopardizing plans to rein in the budget deficit as the country gears up for a pivotal election in 2027.

title: Turkey Liquidated Almost All US Treasury Holdings in March
title_cn: 土耳其三月份清算了几乎所有美国国债
summary: Turkey offloaded almost all of its US Treasuries in March as it stepped up efforts to defend the lira amid intense economic pressure from soaring energy costs.

summary: There are, by all appearances, more than enough dollars flowing into Argentina for the country to fulfill its pledge to replenish its depleted foreign reserves. Each week, they pour in, the result of factors such as a boom in commodity exports and corporate bond sales.

title: SpaceX Files for Nasdaq IPO | Bloomberg Tech 5/21/2026
title_cn: SpaceX 提交纳斯达克 IPO 申请彭博科技 2026 年 5 月 21 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Ed Ludlow breaks down SpaceX pitching a $28.5 trillion opportunity, from AI to Mars, ahead of an all-time blockbuster IPO. Plus, Nvidia fails to reignite the AI trade as CEO Jensen Huang pushes to diversify the chipmaker, saying AI is set to go mainstream. And, another major IPO on the horizon with OpenAI preparing for a filing which could come as soon as Friday. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Spotify Shares Surge on New Music Licensing Deal, Concert Ticket Perks

summary: New co-CEOs outline ambitious plans for growth over the next four years at their first investor day.

title: The Startups Building on Nvidia Compute
title_cn: 基于 Nvidia 计算的初创公司
summary: A part of Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang's latest message to investors is that Nvidia isn't just selling chips to Big Tech anymore: it's supplying the picks and shovels for an AI gold rush, where startups are building everything from AI agents to humanoid robots and robotaxis on Nvidia compute. One of the key backers of that ecosystem is Sarah Guo, founder of AI-native venture firm Conviction. She joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nvidia's Investing Strategy Is 'Smart', Says T. Rowe Price's Wang
title_cn: T. Rowe Price 的 Wang 表示，Nvidia 的投资策略是“明智的”
summary: Nvidia aims to rely less on giant data center operators and predicts other businesses and governments will become a bigger source of revenue for its chips and computing products to support AI ambitions. Tony Wang, portfolio manager of the T. Rowe Price Science and Technology Fund, joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX IPO Filing 'Aspirational,' Says Piper Sandler's Webster
title_cn: Piper Sandler 的韦伯斯特表示，SpaceX 的 IPO 申请“充满抱负”
summary: SpaceX's S-1 filing asks investors to believe in three things: AI in space, a million people on Mars, and Elon Musk's ability to make it all happen. Lauren Webster, Piper Sandler's head of technology investment banking, joins Ed Ludlow to discuss if investors can bet on a future that doesn't fully exist yet on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oaktree Finds `Boring Is Beautiful' Winners in Credit
title_cn: 橡树资本发现“无聊即美丽”的获奖者
summary: Danielle Poli, co-portfolio manager for global credit at Oaktree Capital Management, says a cautious approach to credit investing still provides opportunities for tempting yields. She speaks with Dani Burger and Matthew Miller on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Smart Ring Maker Oura Files Confidentially for IPO
title_cn: 智能戒指制造商 Oura 秘密提交 IPO 申请

title: Nvidia Shows AI Opportunity Extends Beyond Hyperscalers
title_cn: Nvidia 展示 AI 机会不仅仅限于超大规模企业
summary:
Hyperscalers’ capex boom is closely watched as the ultimate barometer of how long the AI cycle lasts. Nvidia’s earnings show demand broadening and rising faster elsewhere, reducing chipmakers’ overdependence on mega-cap tech.
Ivan Feinseth, CIO at Tigress Financial, recaps Nvidia earnings and discusses his outlook on the broader sector as some big tech IPOs loom. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Billionaire Novogratz Fights $100 Million Fee on Dud Crypto Deal
title_cn: 亿万富翁诺沃格拉茨就无用的加密货币交易收取 1 亿美元费用
summary: Michael Novogratz, the billionaire founder of Galaxy Digital Inc., squared off in court this week with BitGo Holdings Inc. Chief Executive Officer Mike Belshe in their protracted legal fight over a proposed merger that failed four years ago when the cryptocurrency markets cratered.

title: Gracias’ Valor Stands to Pocket Billions From SpaceX IPO
title_cn: Gracias 的勇气有望从 SpaceX IPO 中赚到数十亿美元
summary: Antonio Gracias, the founder of Valor Equity Partners and a longtime Elon Musk ally, controls a 4% economic stake in SpaceX through various funds, the second-largest position disclosed after Musk himself that will earn the investor and his firm a giant windfall.

title: Big Tech’s AI Debt Binge Tests High-Grade Market, Barclays Says
title_cn: 巴克莱表示，大型科技公司的人工智能债务狂潮正在测试高端市场
summary: The biggest tech companies are borrowing more than expected to fund their spending on data centers and other artificial intelligence infrastructure, and the investment-grade bond market won’t be able to accommodate all of their financing needs.

title: UN Draft Treaty Aims to Boost Nations’ Rights to Tax Tech Giants
title_cn: 联合国条约草案旨在增强各国对科技巨头征税的权利
summary: Countries at the United Nations are rewriting international tax rules in an effort to be able to tax technology giants like Alphabet and Amazon based on where their users are located rather than where they’re headquartered.

title: Spotify Co-CEO On The "Disco Ball" Rage
title_cn: Spotify 联合首席执行官谈“迪斯科球”风潮
summary: Spotify added a temporary disco ball to its logo for its 20th anniversary. Co-CEO Gustav Söderström explains why the internet’s immediate "everyone needs to get fired" rage over the design change is actually comforting.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: NYC Private School Bids $20 Million for Bankrupt Peer’s Campus
title_cn: 纽约市私立学校出价 2000 万美元购买破产同行校园
summary: Nearly a year after Manhattan Country School went bankrupt and closed, its former campus has found a potential buyer in an up-and-coming school that offers what it refers to as a Classical Christian education.

title: Nvidia's Next AI Growth Driver
title_cn: Nvidia 的下一个人工智能增长动力
summary: Nvidia's latest earnings reveal a major shift in AI demand. TD Cowen analyst Joshua Buchalter explains why hyperscalers are no longer the whole story, how AI is moving beyond data centers into the real world, and why the company's massive supply chain commitments could cement its dominance for years. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nvidia's Huang Is 'Dunking' on Competition, Luria Says
title_cn: 卢里亚称，英伟达黄仁勋在竞争中“扣篮”
summary: Gil Luria, DA Davidson head of technology research, says Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang is "dunking" on all the competition. Joe Kaiser of Switchyard Partners also reacts to Nvidia's earnings and SpaceX going public. They are on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: EU Seeks to Lift Ban on Chinese Chips It Barred Only Weeks Ago
title_cn: 欧盟寻求解除几周前对中国芯片的禁令
summary: The European Union will propose temporarily lifting sanctions on a major Chinese semiconductor supplier after automakers warned of impending supply chain chaos if the ban isn’t removed.

title: The David Rubenstein Show: FedEx President and CEO Raj Subramaniam
title_cn: 大卫·鲁宾斯坦秀：联邦快递总裁兼首席执行官 Raj Subramaniam
summary: FedEx President and CEO Raj Subramaniam discusses how the company moves nearly $2 trillion worth of goods annually, its use of AI and data analytics, autonomous trucking, and the massive transformation underway inside FedEx. He also shares his personal journey from Kerala, India to becoming CEO of one of the world's largest transportation companies, including lessons from founder Fred Smith and the culture that continues to drive FedEx forward. Subramaniam is on this week's episode of "The David Rubenstein Show: Peer to Peer Conversations." This interview was recorded April 29 at the Economic Club of Washington DC. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Trade Still in 'Very Early Innings,' PNC's Agati Says
title_cn: PNC 的阿加蒂表示，人工智能贸易仍处于“非常早期的阶段”
summary: PNC Asset Management Chief Investment Officer Amanda Agati sees "a little bit of steam coming out of the market rally sails." She speaks on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Anti-Data Center Rebels in Texas Pray to Jesus to Keep Them Out
title_cn: 德克萨斯州的反数据中心叛乱分子祈求耶稣阻止他们
summary: In a state known for pro-business policies, some local activists are trying to block the big-money projects that power AI.

title: Anthropic Weighs Using Microsoft AI Chips, Information Says
title_cn: 信息称 Anthropic 使用微软人工智能芯片进行称重
summary: Anthropic PBC is in talks to rent Microsoft Corp. AI server chips, the Information reported, as the startup seeks to boost computing power and meet demand for its services.

title: AI Hardware Startup Hark Valued at $6 Billion in New Funding Round
title_cn: AI硬件初创公司Hark在新一轮融资中估值达60亿美元
summary: Entrepreneur Brett Adcock’s new startup Hark has secured over $700 million in a funding round that values the artificial intelligence-focused hardware company at $6 billion, including the money raised.

title: Microsoft Turns to Video-Game Researcher to Fire Up Xbox Revival
title_cn: 微软聘请视频游戏研究人员来推动 Xbox 复兴
summary: Microsoft Corp. hired a longtime video-game industry analyst to help turn around its Xbox division.

title: Progress in Iran Talks Undercut by Divide Over Uranium, Tolls
title_cn: 伊朗谈判的进展因铀和通行费分歧而受到削弱
summary: Iran said the latest proposal from the US partly bridged the gap between the warring sides but comments from the Islamic Republic’s Supreme Leader about keeping Tehran’s uranium stockpile and a dispute over tolls in the Strait of Hormuz clouded the outlook for a breakthrough.

title: The Economic Impact of Gerrymandering
title_cn: 不公正划分选区的经济影响
summary: On today’s Big Take podcast, Stacey Vanek Smith and economist Julianne Malveaux talks about the economic impact of politicians trying to redistrict America ahead of midterms. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Postpones Signing AI Security Order Over Parts He Disliked
title_cn: 特朗普推迟签署他不喜欢的部分人工智能安全令
summary: President Donald Trump said he called off the signing of an executive order that would address cybersecurity concerns raised by powerful new artificial intelligence models because he objected to parts of the directive, casting doubt on US efforts to respond to new risks posed by the emerging technology.

title: Iran Has Destroyed Roughly $1 Billion Worth of US Reaper Drones
title_cn: 伊朗摧毁了价值约 10 亿美元的美国“收割者”无人机
summary: Iran has destroyed more than two dozen MQ-9 Reaper drones operated by US forces since the war began, a significant loss worth nearly $1 billion that represents 20% of the Pentagon’s prewar inventory for the hard-to-replace unmanned system.

title: Trump’s Weaponization Fund Hits Republican Backlash in Senate
title_cn: 特朗普的武器化基金遭到参议院共和党人的强烈反对
summary: Senate Republicans stalemated over President Donald Trump $1.8 billion account to pay political allies alleged to be victims of government “weaponization,” a dramatic setback for the president even as he threatens to vanquish perceived political foes within his own party.

title: India-Africa Summit Postponed Indefinitely Over Ebola Outbreak
title_cn: 印度-非洲峰会因埃博拉疫情无限期推迟
summary: An India-Africa summit due to begin in New Delhi at the end of May has been postponed indefinitely because of concerns about the Ebola outbreak.

title: Iran Looks at Setting Up Permanent Hormuz Toll System
title_cn: 伊朗考虑建立永久性霍尔木兹收费系统
summary: Iran is discussing with Oman how to set up a permanent toll system to formalize its control of maritime traffic through the Strait of Hormuz. President Donald Trump says he wants the waterway open and free. Bloomberg's Jeff Mason has the latest from the White House. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: How Trump’s Cuba Grudge Threw a 99-Year-Old Mining Company Into Turmoil
title_cn: 特朗普的古巴恩怨如何让一家拥有 99 年历史的矿业公司陷入混乱
summary: Facing a crisis after the US expanded sanctions on Cuba, Sherritt International may now be rescued by a former adviser to the president.

title: Turkey Court Unseats Opposition Head, Triggering Market Rout
title_cn: 土耳其法院罢免反对党领袖，引发市场暴跌
summary: A Turkish court removed the leader of the country’s main opposition party, in a landmark ruling that led to a stock market selloff and state intervention to defend the lira.

title: Iran in Talks With Oman Over Permanent Hormuz Toll System
title_cn: 伊朗与阿曼就永久霍尔木兹收费系统进行谈判
summary: Iran is discussing with Oman how to set up some form of a permanent toll system that will formalize its control of maritime traffic through the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Gulf States Tell Ships Not to Use Iran’s Strait of Hormuz Route
title_cn: 海湾国家告诉船只不要使用伊朗霍尔木兹海峡航线
summary: Five Middle Eastern countries have formally rejected Iran’s establishment of the Persian Gulf Strait Authority to control transit through the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Trump Calls Birthright Citizenship a 'Disgrace'
title_cn: 特朗普称出生公民权是“耻辱”
summary: President Donald Trump says "birthright citizenship is a disgrace," but he expects the US Supreme Court to allow it. Justices are expected to hand down a decision before they leave for the summer. Trump speaks in the Oval Office. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: New York Tax on NYC Cash Home Purchases Close to Collapsing
title_cn: 纽约现金购房税接近崩溃
summary: A proposal to levy a new tax on all-cash real estate transactions over $1 million in New York City is likely to be dropped from the state budget, according to people familiar with the negotiations.

title: US Finalizes Easement for Dakota Access Crude Oil Pipeline
title_cn: 美国最终确定达科他原油管道的地役权
summary: The US Army Corps of Engineers finalized an easement for a stretch of the Dakota Access pipeline that passes under a North Dakota lake, ending a years-long environmental review of the hotly contested oil conduit.

title: SEC’s Peirce to Depart Wall Street Regulator for Law School Job
title_cn: 美国证券交易委员会的皮尔斯将离开华尔街监管机构前往法学院工作
summary: US Securities and Exchange Commission member Hester Peirce is set to depart the agency and join Regent University School of Law as an associate professor in November, according to a statement from the Virginia school.

title: Trump Eases Restrictions on Refrigerants for Appliances
title_cn: 特朗普放宽对家电制冷剂的限制
summary: President Donald Trump says removing restrictions on gases used in refrigerators and air conditioners will lower costs for businesses, calling the requirements "ridiculous." He spoke to reporters during an event at the White House. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Wants Strait of Hormuz Open, Free, With No Tolls
title_cn: 特朗普希望霍尔木兹海峡开放、免费、不收费
summary: President Trump says the US wants the Strait of Hormuz to be open and free of tolls. Iran is in talks with Oman to set up some form of a permanent toll system. Trump spoke to reporters at the White House. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Says US Will Get Iran's Uranium
title_cn: 特朗普称美国将获得伊朗的铀
summary: President Donald Trump delivers remarks from the Oval Office on ballroom construction progress, tariffs, relations with Cuba, and the war in Iran. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: DraftKings, FanDuel Amass Pro-Gambling Wins in Alabama Primary
title_cn: DraftKings、FanDuel 聚集职业赌博者在阿拉巴马州初选获胜
summary: DraftKings and FanDuel are on a roll when it comes to backing political campaigns in a state known for being at the center of college sports, marking an early victory for the industry as it seeks to install gambling-friendly lawmakers in state legislatures across the country.

title: Trump Delays Superpollutant Restrictions in Bid to Reduce Costs
title_cn: 特朗普推迟超级污染物限制以降低成本
summary: President Donald Trump said he’s easing requirements on planet-warming refrigerants, touting the move as a way to cut costs for consumers as he looks to address voters’ affordability concerns before November midterms.

title: Ukraine Starts Operation to Fend Off New Threat From North
title_cn: 乌克兰开始行动抵御来自北方的新威胁
summary: Ukraine has announced a major security buildup in the country’s north to deter Russia from launching another push toward Kyiv via the territory of neighboring Belarus.

title: Why Critics Call Trump’s $1.8B Anti-Weaponization Fund an Abuse of Power
title_cn: 为什么批评者称特朗普的 1.8B 美元反武器化基金滥用权力
summary: The US Justice Department on May 18 struck a deal with President Donald Trump to create a $1.77 billion legal fund to pay victims of alleged government “weaponization,” an unusual agreement that could result in millions of dollars in taxpayer money being doled out to Trump’s allies and supporters.

title: Baltics Rebuke Russia for ‘Disinfo’ on Ukraine Drone Incursions
title_cn: 波罗的海国家谴责俄罗斯对乌克兰无人机入侵的“虚假信息”
summary: The Baltic states have hit back against a Kremlin “disinformation campaign” claiming that they’ve opened their airspace to allow Ukrainian drones to strike Russia.

title: Euro-Zone Growth Is Buckling Under Weight of War Impact
title_cn: 欧元区经济增长因战争影响而下滑
summary: The euro area will slow markedly while suffering the fastest inflation since 2023 as it succumbs to the energy-cost surge from the Iran war, according to the European Commission.

title: Putin and Lukashenko Monitor Major Joint Nuclear Drills
title_cn: 普京和卢卡申科监督大型联合核演习
summary: Russian President Vladimir Putin and his Belarus counterpart, Alexander Lukashenko, took part by videolink in massive joint nuclear drills, a symbolic display of strategic unity between the neighboring allies.

title: Lithuania Tells People to Seek Shelter Over Drones Sighting
title_cn: 立陶宛告诉人们在看到无人机后寻求庇护
summary: The Lithuanian military activated sirens and told residents of the northeastern Utena region to seek shelter after unidentified drones crossed into the Baltic state.
